chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 209 of 2012 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1286/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for the respondent. On the last date, following order was passed: “10.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocates for the respondent. None present for the applicant, nor any intimation is received. Adjourned to 08-10-2025, with a note of caution, if no one appears on the said date, appropriate orders may be passed.” Today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
